content: If we map LLM multi-perspective self-reflection mechanisms to the literary and philosophical concept of Reflexion, we can frame Reflexion as an innate self-correction loop for human personal narrative, where inconsistent life perspectives serve the same function as inconsistent solving perspectives in LLM Self-Contrast: rejecting low-quality, biased narrative interpretations to build a more coherent, adaptive sense of self. This framework lets us borrow LLM self-reflection engineering to design structured practices for human reflective growth.
